title: Custom View Layout
excerpt: Is there a 3rd party app or a way to customize the layout of the card view? I have hidden many columns but I’d like to be able to layout the card so that it’s more dense, it currently has one  piece of data (column) per …

posts.author: jshubert (Jeremy Shubert)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a 3rd party app or a way to customize the layout of the card view? I have hidden many columns but I’d like to be able to layout the card so that it’s more dense, it currently has one piece of data (column) per row which makes the card very tall and narrow. I’d like to resize certain fields, rearrange how they show on the card, group them, etc.

posts.author: jshubert (Jeremy Shubert)
posts.cookedHtml: Just to follow up, Airtable has Interface Designer and it’s exactly what I’m asking for from Monday.

posts.author: Jorgeec (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jeremy, thanks for sharing the info.
Please can you send me more information.
Can I choose which columns or fields I need to see?
Regards
Jorge
